applied_optimizations.name: Fused Triton kernel for tanh+scale+bias
applied_optimizations.description: Implemented fused_tanh_scale_bias_kernel using manual tanh formula (exp-based) compatible with ROCm Triton. Fuses tanh activation, scaling, and bias addition into a single kernel. Uses BLOCK_SIZE=256 (multiple of 64) for AMD wavefront alignment.

notes: Baseline established: PyTorch reference = 5.21ms, Triton kernel = 4.49ms
Manual tanh implementation using tl.math.exp works correctly on ROCm
BLOCK_SIZE=256 (multiple of 64) aligns with AMD wavefront size
Conv2d and max_pool2d remain as PyTorch operators - potential further optimization targets

attempted_but_failed.name: trial_4
attempted_but_failed.reason: Trial 4 produced no output, same as trials 2 and 3. The agent appears to crash or stall before executing any code. Need extremely explicit step-by-step instructions with actual code to prevent the age

attempted_but_failed.reason: Trial 5 produced no output, the 4th consecutive crash. The agent is failing to even start executing. Providing complete copy-paste-ready code for the fused tanh+scale+bias+maxpool kernel to eliminate
